title: Qualité de la vie
description: Adds Quality of Life features that everyone needs in their Survival and hardcore worlds and servers
body:
Epic QoL Datapack 1.21
Enhance Your Minecraft Experience with Epic QoL!

Transform your Minecraft world with the Datapack for version 1.21! This datapack is designed to streamline gameplay, improve user experience, and add practical features that make your adventure smoother and more enjoyable. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the game, you'll find these enhancements make a big difference.

Download the Ultimate QoL Datapack file.
Place the file in your Minecraft world’s datapacks folder.
Load your world or run /reload to activate the datapack.
Compatibility:

Designed for Minecraft 1.21, this datapack is compatible with most other mods and datapacks. Ensure you have a backup of your world before installation.
